page_content:
THET498 Seminar. Theatre History (3 Credits)

Studies in theatre history from classical antiquity to the present. Prerequisite: THET488 or THET489.

Restriction: Senior standing; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs. Jointly offered with THET698. Credit Only Granted for. THET498 or THET6 98.
